title: Newsprint Ledger
summary: A 1962 financial newspaper in dark mode. Saved sites and start routes rendered as a ledger table with tabular figures.
darkAccent: muted ink-rust #B14A39 — applied only to the active dock left bar and the save pill underline
typeface: Spectral Italic Display 500 (headlines) + Public Sans 400 (body and tabular figures)
railTreatment: five italic Spectral words set in a vertical column (Sites · Manager · Blueprint · Database · Logs) — each silhouette distinct by word length; identity mast 'WP' above a hairline
listPattern: ledger table with column headers — Name / WP / PHP / Size / Updated, hairline separators between rows, no per-row icon, header row at the top in small-cap labels

title: Departure Board
summary: A 1970s rail terminal split-flap board. Saved sites are destinations; one stencil status word is the only meta per row.
darkAccent: amber #E08A2C — applied only to the active flap row, status words and the save pill underline
typeface: Saira Stencil One (rail, titles, status words) + Public Sans (body and field meta)
railTreatment: five silhouette-diverse stencil cuts — single oversized 'S' / three-letter 'MGR' / two-letter 'BP' / spaced 'D·B' / three-letter 'LOG' — each occupies a clearly different visual footprint; identity mast 'WP' inside a bordered tile above
listPattern: split-flap rows — title left in stencil all-caps, single status word right (READY/LIVE/IDLE/BOOT/STALE/NEW), hairline between rows, no second line, no per-row icon

title: Punchcard
summary: A 1965 IBM machine room. Each saved site is a punchcard; perforated dots encode WP / PHP / Size where most designs would put a second text row.
darkAccent: signal yellow #E2C44A — applied only to the active card's left bar, the save pill border and the lit perforations
typeface: Cutive (rail, titles, labels — typewriter-feeling but proportional) + DM Sans (body)
railTreatment: five perforated tab plates, each with a unique punch pattern (1 dot · 2 stacked · 3 stacked · 4 with-gap · 4 grid) — each silhouette mechanically distinct
listPattern: punchcard rows — title at top, then three perforation axes (WP / PHP / SIZE) drawn as 10 small circular dots each; the punched dots encode the value, with an inline scale label inside the dot row; no second text row, no per-row icon, the dots ARE the meta

title: Postcard Rack
summary: A wire postcard rack outside a seaside bookshop at 9pm. Saved sites are tilted cream postcards with stamp, postmark and sender line — no data row.
darkAccent: faded ocean teal #3E8A78 — applied only to the active card's outline, its stamp, and the save pill border
typeface: DM Serif Display (postcard titles, headlines) + Lora italic (body and sender notes)
railTreatment: five hand-drawn SVG stamp glyphs (lighthouse · key · folded letter · cabinet · ledger), each a distinct silhouette in 1.2px stroke; identity mast 'w' inside a dashed plate above
listPattern: postcard rack — landscape cream cards overlap on a wire spinner, each tilted (-2.4 to +2.6deg) with the title as the primary face, a small perforated stamp top-right, and a hairline postmark + sender note at the foot; cards stack with negative margin so the rack metaphor reads at a glance

title: Stamp Sheet
summary: A scholarly philatelic album. Saved sites are perforated stamps (CSS mask) with title centred and a single denomination at the corner — no meta-line.
darkAccent: cinnabar #C24A2C — applied only to the active stamp's inner border, the save pill, and the booting plate
typeface: Cormorant Garamond italic (stamp titles, headlines) + Atkinson Hyperlegible (body, dock labels, log lines)
railTreatment: five hand-drawn philatelic motifs (compass rose, key, folded paper, anchor stone, fountain pen), each a distinct silhouette in 1.3px stroke; identity mast is a perforated cream tile
listPattern: perforated stamp grid — each saved site is a 100% wide x 160px stamp produced with a four-edge CSS radial-gradient mask for the perforation; centred italic title; a single denomination figure in the bottom-right is the only meta mark per stamp; no per-row icon, no second text row

title: Vertical Book Spines
summary: A Mayfair antiquarian shelf — saved sites are vertical-rl book spines; width encodes site size; gilt ribbon names the active. No icons, no meta-rows.
darkAccent: gilt #B3893D — saving pill, active dock ribbon, active spine ribbon only
typeface: Cormorant Garamond italic (spines + titles) + Atkinson Hyperlegible (body)
railTreatment: five distinct ribbon-bookmark silhouettes — pennant, deep cut, scalloped, dome, narrow-tail — each rendered as inline SVG of unique outline
listPattern: vertical book spines — titles set writing-mode vertical-rl on a wood shelf; spine width encodes site size; gilt top-ribbon names the active spine; no icons; no meta-row beneath any title

title: Wall Labels (Museum)
summary: A small natural-history gallery — saved sites are typeset wall-labels with a single prose ascription sentence. The list reads as language, not data.
darkAccent: bone-cream #D9CFAA — saving pill, active dock bar, picture-light over active label only
typeface: Spectral italic display + Plus Jakarta Sans body
railTreatment: five Roman numerals I, II, III, IV, V — each in Spectral at a different optical weight (300/400/500/600/500 roman) so silhouettes differ
listPattern: wall-label cartouches — italic title plus a single prose ascription sentence; no per-row icon; no metadata row; a picture-light cone marks the active object

title: Hand-Lettered Ledger
summary: A private journal at 11pm — saved sites are single Caveat Brush hand-lettered lines on a 1px ruled vellum stripe. Meta hides until hover.
darkAccent: india-ink red #A14538 — saving pill, active dock left bar, active underline-swoop only
typeface: Caveat Brush (handwritten titles + rail labels) + Source Serif 4 (body, italic for quiet metadata)
railTreatment: five hand-drawn flourishes in inline SVG — single sweep, broken curl, four dots, descending tail, multi-stroke wave — each a distinct gesture in stroke shape
listPattern: hand-lettered ledger — one Caveat Brush line per entry on a horizontal ruled stripe; no icon; no metadata row; meta surfaces in italic on hover; active line wears a red dot in the margin and a hand-drawn underline-swoop

title: Cinematic Lookbook
summary: A luxury fashion lookbook — saved sites are square tiles with CSS-gradient mock screenshots and Playfair Display titles overlaid. No meta on tile face.
darkAccent: gold #C9A24B — saving pill, active dock border, active tile border + gold pinpoint only
typeface: Playfair Display italic (titles + overlay headlines) + Mona Sans (body, 300/400/600/700)
railTreatment: five tiny abstract poster swatches — coffee gradient, radial bone, blueprint stripe, warm slash, repeating vertical mullion — each a distinct miniature thumbnail
listPattern: lookbook tiles — square tiles filled with CSS-gradient mock screenshots that suggest each site's theme color; title overlay at bottom in Playfair Display italic; NO metadata line on tile face; active tile gets gold border and gold pinpoint

title: Liner Notes Column
summary: A 1965 jazz LP liner-notes column — saved sites are numbered tracks with leader dots and a runtime (minutes since opened). One column, no icons, no second row.
darkAccent: cool steel-blue #7AA0B3 — saving pill, active dock left bar, active-track play-mark only
typeface: Newsreader italic display + Atkinson Hyperlegible body (tabular figures via font-feature-settings tnum)
railTreatment: five typographic A-side/B-side marks — ▶ ▣ ▤ ▥ ▦ — chosen for distinct silhouettes (triangle, filled square, two horizontal bars, three horizontal bars, four-cell grid)
listPattern: track-listing column — numbered (01., 02., or A1/B1 for sides), italic title, leader-dot row, right-aligned tabular runtime in minutes since opened; one column; no icon; no second row

title: Inscription Hall
summary: A memorial hall of chiseled-capital tablets. Saved sites and start routes appear as Cinzel inscriptions: COFFEE SHOP centre, MMXXVI Roman date, bronze rule.
darkAccent: warm bronze #9F7A3C — saving pill + active inscription cross-bar only
typeface: Cinzel (rail + inscriptions) + Atkinson Hyperlegible (body)
railTreatment: five Roman numerals carved in Cinzel — I, II, III, IV, V — each numeral a distinct silhouette by stroke count
listPattern: inscription — each entry a chiseled-capital line, e.g. COFFEE SHOP · MMXXVI, centred, 1px bronze rule beneath; no icon, no meta row

title: Variable-Axis Specimen
summary: A type-specimen book where Recursive's variable axes ARE the data — weight=size, casual=current state, slant=activity. The title is the row.
darkAccent: signal lime #B6D34A — saving pill only
typeface: Recursive Sans (variable, axes flexed per entry) — single family throughout
railTreatment: five single Recursive letters S, M, B, D, L — each at a unique point in MONO/CASL/wght space so silhouettes differ
listPattern: variable-axis specimen — each entry is its title set in Recursive at a unique wght/CASL/slnt point; the title is the data — no row, no icon, no meta line

title: Stencil ID Plates
summary: A military shipping yard at night. Each saved site is a stencil-cut crate plate — title COFFEE SHOP, stock number WP67/PHP82/14M stenciled in the corner. No meta row.
darkAccent: signal orange #E07A2C — saving pill + active plate notch only
typeface: Saira Stencil One (rail + titles) + Public Sans (body)
railTreatment: five stenciled 2-letter abbreviations — SI, SM, BP, DB, LG — each at a slightly different stencil weight so silhouettes differ
listPattern: stencil id plate — single stencil-cut title on a dark plate; corner stock number WP67/PHP82/14M as one terse compound — never a separate meta row

title: Hierarchy by Size
summary: A typographic experiment where size IS the data: newest playground at 56px, oldest at 18px. No icon, no meta line — the visual hierarchy carries recency.
darkAccent: bone #E2DDC8 — saving pill only; the design is otherwise tonal only
typeface: DM Serif Display (titles) + DM Sans (body)
railTreatment: five DM Serif Display capitals — S, M, B, D, L — at varying sizes (12, 16, 22, 28, 16 px) so silhouettes differ by size alone
listPattern: hierarchy by size only — saved titles stacked vertically, each at a font-size proportional to recency; the size IS the data; no icon, no meta row

title: Marquee Letterboard
summary: An indie cinema marquee at 10pm. Plastic Anton letters slotted into a black grooved board: COFFEE SHOP — NOW SHOWING. Title plus one slogan-style state word; no second row.
darkAccent: bulb-yellow #FFD068 — saving pill + active marquee-letter glow only
typeface: Anton (marquee letters) + Public Sans (body)
railTreatment: five Anton uppercase letters S M B D L set at 32px in plastic-letter style — silhouettes differ by Anton's idiosyncratic letterforms
listPattern: marquee letterboard — each entry one line of slotted plastic Anton letters: title plus a single slogan-style state word (NOW SHOWING / IDLE / PREMIERE); no icon, no second row

title: Architectural Plan
summary: Drafting-table dark mode. Every playground is a plan-view rectangle whose width encodes site size. Cormorant labels sit inside the rectangle. No icon, no meta-line.
darkAccent: muted blueprint cyan #5C8AA6 — saving pill, active rectangle stroke, current-rail tick. Single accent.
typeface: Cormorant Garamond italic (titles, plan labels) + Manrope 300–700 (body, eyebrows, tabular figures via font-feature-settings 'tnum').
railTreatment: five distinct plan-view symbols, single SVG stroke each: door-swing arc, window cross-mullion, stair-tread polyline, column dot inside circle, broken-wall break. Each silhouette unmistakably different from the others.
listPattern: plan-view rectangles — width of each rectangle is its site's relative disk footprint; only a Cormorant italic title sits inside. No per-row icon. No metadata text-row. The geometry is the data.

title: Sportsbook Jersey
summary: Stadium jersey wall, dark mode. Each playground is a 280×100 tile with a giant Anton numeral and a single Public Sans line. The numeral is the visual; there is no meta-row.
darkAccent: red-clay #B14A39 — saving pill, active jersey numeral, active stripe, identity mark. Single accent.
typeface: Anton (oversized numerals, eyebrows, dock numerals) + Public Sans 300–700 (titles on tiles, body, eyebrows).
railTreatment: five jersey numerals 01 02 03 04 05 set in Anton 28px with tabular figures. Each numeral is its own silhouette because Anton's tight kerning makes 01, 02, 03, 04, 05 distinct at a glance. Active jersey takes the clay accent.
listPattern: jersey tiles — 280×100 tile, left third holds a 74px Anton numeral (jersey number), right two-thirds holds a single Public Sans line with the title. No icon, no meta-row, no secondary text. The numeral is the visual.

title: Newspaper Masthead
summary: Dark-mode broadsheet. Each saved playground is its own mini-masthead — a double rule, a Playfair 24px title, and an italic dateline that carries the only data. No second row.
darkAccent: ink-rust #A14538 — saving pill, active dateline, active double-rule, active dock italic, identity mark accents. Single accent.
typeface: Playfair Display 400–700 + italics (mastheads, dock labels, datelines, ident) + Source Serif 4 8..60 opsz (body, lede, italic UI prose, tabular figures via tnum).
railTreatment: five Playfair word marks set vertically — Sites · Manager · Blueprint · Database · Logs — each separated by hairline rules; the active dock becomes italic and shifts to ink-rust. Silhouettes differ by word length.
listPattern: mini-mastheads — each entry is a 2-line broadsheet masthead: a top double-rule (2px above, 1px below), a centred Playfair 24px title, and an italic dateline (Vol. III · No. 22 · WP 6.7/PHP 8.2 · 14.2 MB · 24 May 2026) that carries the only data. No second text row, no per-row icon.

title: Inverted Contrast
summary: Bodoni Moda opsz 72 hairlines on jet black. The saved-sites pane is a column of titles whose high-contrast cut is the entire visual. A 1px-faint tabular suffix carries size.
darkAccent: bone-warm #E8DEC2 — saving pill, active title, active rail letter, identity tint. Tonal lift rather than chromatic accent. Single accent.
typeface: Bodoni Moda variable (opsz 6–96, ital, wght 400–700) for all display copy — titles, dock letters, eyebrows, settings values, button labels, datelines + Manrope 300–600 for body copy, tabular figures (tnum/lnum), file names, log messages.
railTreatment: five Bodoni Moda hairline capitals — S · M · B · D · L — set at 26px opsz 14, vertically centred. Each silhouette is unmistakably different by virtue of the letterform itself; the active letter shifts to bone-warm and gains a 3px dot beneath.
listPattern: inverted-contrast titles — each entry is a single line set in Bodoni Moda opsz 72 at 36px on near-black. The hairline-thick-thin contrast is the entire visual. A 1px-faint Manrope tabular suffix on the right carries size in tabular numerals. No meta-line, no per-row icon. Active entry is italicized and shifts to bone-warm.

title: Tabular Figures Column
summary: A treasurer's annual report in dark mode. Saved sites become a single column — title left, right-aligned tabular figures right. Figures align by feature, not by glyph width.
darkAccent: drafting-blue #5C8AA6 — saving pill, active row underline, active dock tick, identity tint. Single accent.
typeface: Source Serif 4 8..60 opsz with font-feature-settings 'tnum','lnum' (titles, settings values, dock numerals at varied weights, dir names) + Source Sans 3 300–700 with font-variant-numeric 'tabular-nums lining-nums' (body, eyebrows, log msgs, all numeric columns).
railTreatment: five Source Serif 4 numeric tags 1·2·3·4·5 set at varied weights 300/400/500/600/700 — each rail item distinct in stroke weight; a small Source Sans abbreviation (St/Mg/Bp/Db/Lg) sits to the right of each numeral as a faint typographic key, not as a button-secondary-label.
listPattern: tabular figures column — each entry is a single grid row: title left in Source Serif 4 16px, then right-aligned columns of Source Sans 3 figures (`6.7  8.2  14.2 MB  22 May`) with `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums lining-nums`. The figures align because they're tabular, not because the type is monospace. No header row repeated per item, no per-row icon, no meta-second-row.
